title: alcea tiliacea
intro: Alcea tiliacea, also known as the Hollyhock, is a perennial flowering plant native to Europe and Asia. The medicinal properties of Alcea tiliacea lie in its roots, leaves, and flowers, which have been traditionally used to treat a variety of ailments, including skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to soothe and heal the skin, reduce pain and swelling, and combat infections. Alcea tiliacea can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
